queries.question: Show LMN Bank transaction amounts that are either payments or remittance transfers.
queries.sql:
SELECT Transactions.Amount 
FROM Transactions JOIN Accounts ON Transactions.ToAccountId = Accounts.AccountID JOIN Customers ON Accounts.CustomerID = Customers.CustomerID JOIN Banks ON Customers.BankID = Banks.BankID JOIN Transaction_Types ON Transaction_Types.Typeid = Transactions.Typeid
WHERE (Transaction_Types.TypeName = 'Payment' OR Transaction_Types.TypeName = 'Remittance Transfer') AND Banks.Name = 'LMN Bank'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?amount WHERE {
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts_ToAccountId ?accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?customers p:hasBanks ?banks .
  ?transaction_types a :Transaction_Types .
  ?transactions p:hasTransaction_Types ?transaction_types .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transaction_types p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?transaction_types p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?banks p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typename_w) = "Payment" || STR(?typename_w2) = "Remittance Transfer")) && STR(?name_w) = "LMN Bank"))
}

queries.question: List the amounts of all payments and remittance transfers from LMN Bank.
queries.sql:
SELECT Transactions.Amount 
FROM Transactions JOIN Accounts ON Transactions.ToAccountId = Accounts.AccountID JOIN Customers ON Accounts.CustomerID = Customers.CustomerID JOIN Banks ON Customers.BankID = Banks.BankID JOIN Transaction_Types ON Transaction_Types.Typeid = Transactions.Typeid
WHERE Transaction_Types.TypeName = 'Payment' OR Transaction_Types.TypeName = 'Remittance Transfer' AND Banks.Name = 'LMN Bank'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?amount WHERE {
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts_ToAccountId ?accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?customers p:hasBanks ?banks .
  ?transaction_types a :Transaction_Types .
  ?transactions p:hasTransaction_Types ?transaction_types .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transaction_types p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?transaction_types p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?banks p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?typename_w) = "Payment" || (STR(?typename_w2) = "Remittance Transfer" && STR(?name_w) = "LMN Bank")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the amounts of all payments and remittance transfers from LMN Bank.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?amount WHERE {
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts_ToAccountId ?accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?customers p:hasBanks ?banks .
  ?transaction_types a :Transaction_Types .
  ?transactions p:hasTransaction_Types ?transaction_types .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transaction_types p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?transaction_types p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?banks p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typename_w) = "Payment" || STR(?typename_w2) = "Remittance Transfer")) && STR(?name_w) = "LMN Bank"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?amount WHERE {
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts_ToAccountId ?accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?customers p:hasBanks ?banks .
  ?transaction_types a :Transaction_Types .
  ?transactions p:hasTransaction_Types ?transaction_types .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transaction_types p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?transaction_types p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?banks p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?typename_w) = "Payment" || (STR(?typename_w2) = "Remittance Transfer" && STR(?name_w) = "LMN Bank")))
} }
}
